SPORTSBEEP

Next-generation sports ecosystem built on the Cardano blockchain, empowering fans through decentralized utility, community rewards, and high-performance sportsbooks.

Core Project Information

Blockchain: Cardano (ADA)

Token Ticker: $BEEP

Policy ID: a221e11c9d474ac3709911161bcfd02969d268e927089d3c55a4c3c2

Total Supply: 10,000,000 (Fixed Infrastructure)

Initial Valuation: $0.12 per $BEEP (Phase 1 illustrative pricing)

Primary Developer: LAD MEDIA

Tokenomics & Distribution

The $BEEP token follows a controlled, phased distribution model to ensure ecosystem stability.

Distribution Phases

Phase 1 (Current): Closed Beta Allocation. Target: Founders and select beta testers. Utility: Non-tradable off-chain allocation for testing.

Phase 2: Expansion. Allocation: 50,000 $BEEP. Objective: Deepen liquidity and fund core development.

Phase 3: Community Growth. Allocation: 250,000 $BEEP. Objective: Staking mechanisms and referral systems.

Ecosystem Reserve: 6.2M $BEEP reserved for future milestones and community incentives.

Referral Program

Reward: 100 $BEEP per 10 verified referrals.

Mechanism: Unique promo codes (Format: BEEP-XXXXX) provided upon beta registration.

Technical Guidance

$BEEP is a Cardano native asset. Recommended wallets:

Eternl: Power users (Extension/Mobile).

Lace: Official IOG wallet (Beginner-friendly).

Nami: Lightweight browser extension.

Legal & Compliance

Status: Closed Beta.

Risk Warning: Digital assets are volatile.

Responsible Gaming: Ecosystem includes 1-800-GAMBLER resources.
